idea-plugin.name: IDE Index MCP Server
idea-plugin.description:
Supercharge your AI coding assistant with the IDE's powerful code intelligence through the Model Context Protocol (MCP).

If this plugin saves you time, consider buying me a coffee! ☕

Multi-Language Support

Advanced code intelligence tools work across multiple languages when their plugins are available:

  • Java & Kotlin - IntelliJ IDEA, Android Studio
  • Python - PyCharm (all editions), IntelliJ IDEA with Python plugin
  • JavaScript & TypeScript - WebStorm, IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate, PhpStorm
  • Go - GoLand, IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate with Go plugin
  • PHP - PhpStorm, IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate with PHP plugin
  • Rust - RustRover, IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate with Rust plugin, CLion
  • Markdown - heading outlines in file structure via the bundled Markdown plugin

Universal Tools (All Supported IDEs)

These tools work in every supported JetBrains IDE:

  • Find References - Locate all usages of any symbol across your project
  • Go to Definition - Jump to symbol declarations instantly
  • Find Class - Fast class/interface search by name with camelCase/substring/wildcard matching
  • Find File - Fast file search by name using IDE's file index
  • Symbol Search - Find classes, methods, functions, and fields by name with IntelliJ Go to Symbol matching (disabled by default)
  • Search Text - Text search using IDE's pre-built word index with context filtering
  • Code Diagnostics - Access errors, warnings, and available quick fixes
  • Index Status - Check if the IDE is ready for code intelligence
  • Sync Files - Force-sync IDE state with external file changes on demand
  • Build Project - Trigger IDE build with structured error/warning output (disabled by default)
  • Read File - Read file content by path or qualified name, including library sources (disabled by default)
  • Open File - Open a file in the editor with optional navigation (disabled by default)
  • Get Active File - Get currently active editor file(s) with cursor position (disabled by default)

Extended Tools (Language-Aware)

These tools activate based on available language plugins:

  • Type Hierarchy - Explore class inheritance chains (Java, Kotlin, Python, JS/TS, Go, PHP, Rust)
  • Call Hierarchy - Trace method/function call relationships (Java, Kotlin, Python, JS/TS, Go, PHP, Rust)
  • Find Implementations - Discover all implementations of interfaces and abstract methods (Java, Kotlin, Python, JS/TS, PHP, Rust)
  • Find Super Methods - Navigate through method override hierarchies (Java, Kotlin, Python, JS/TS, PHP)
  • File Structure - View hierarchical file structure like IDE's Structure view (Java, Kotlin, Python, JS/TS, PHP, Markdown) (disabled by default)

Refactoring Tools

  • Rename Refactoring - Safe symbol renaming with automatic reference updates - works across ALL languages, fully headless
  • Reformat Code - Reformat using project code style with import optimization (disabled by default)
  • Optimize Imports - Remove unused imports and organize remaining imports without reformatting (disabled by default)
  • Safe Delete - Remove code safely with usage checking (Java/Kotlin only)

Project Lifecycle Management

When working across many projects simultaneously, idle ones consume unnecessary memory and leave editors open for no reason. Lifecycle management automatically sleeps and wakes projects based on window focus and MCP activity:

  • Automatic sleep/wake - Projects transition from active → background → dormant → closed as they sit idle, and reopen transparently on the next MCP call
  • Four modes - Active (full IDE), Background (Power Save on, MCP functional), Dormant (editors closed, PSI cache freed), Closed (fully unloaded, auto-reopens in ~10s)
  • Zero-config enrollment - Projects join lifecycle management automatically on their first MCP tool call
  • Explicit controls - ide_set_project_mode, ide_get_project_modes, ide_project_status, ide_release_project
  • Lifecycle event log - ide_lifecycle_log shows a timestamped history of every state transition with trigger reasons, for diagnosing unexpected behaviour
  • Configurable thresholds - Timing for each transition is set in Settings → Index MCP Server

Why This Plugin?

  • True semantic understanding - Uses the IDE's AST and index, not text matching
  • Cross-project awareness - Works across modules, files, and library dependencies
  • Multi-language - Automatically detects and uses language-specific handlers
  • Safe refactoring - All changes support undo (Ctrl/Cmd+Z)
  • Zero external calls - Everything runs locally in your IDE

Supported AI Assistants

  • Claude Code (CLI)
  • Claude Desktop
  • Codex CLI
  • Cursor
  • Windsurf
  • VS Code with MCP extension
  • Any MCP-compatible client

Quick Start

  1. Install plugin and restart IDE
  2. Open Index MCP Server tool window (bottom panel)
  3. Click "Install on Coding Agents"
  4. Select your AI assistant and follow the instructions

See the GitHub repository for detailed documentation and examples.

action.description: Copy the MCP server URL to clipboard
Copy MCP client configuration for AI assistants
Install or export the companion skill for AI coding agents
Open or wake an MCP-managed project
Open MCP settings to view managed project states
